prompt: Subject: strawberry by the window. Person/Expression: woman, natural long black hair, light bangs and fine loose strands, translucent skin, natural makeup, natural texture showing skin grain and slight freckles, soft gaze at the camera, gentle expression with a hint of playfulness, lips slightly parted naturally. Clothing/Pose: clean white short-sleeved summer uniform, light shirt fabric, navy ribbon tie, elegant attire with minimal exposure, relaxed natural posture, holding a red strawberry to her mouth with one hand, captured at the moment of taking a bite. Background/Light: bright indoor windowsill, clean simple background, space with an everyday atmosphere, soft natural light from the window, faint shadows, light and transparent summer feel. Composition/Camera: 9:16 vertical composition, close-up bust portrait, slightly off-center composition, intimate natural distance, 85mm equivalent portrait expression, shallow depth of field, photographic expression with soft background blur, casual snap vibe. Texture/Style: soft film photo style, pale pastel tones, natural colors with slight color cast, low contrast, smooth highlights, delicate grain, subtle halation, light vignetting, high-definition gentle dreamy finish. Negative: low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, excessive skin retouching, strong contrast, heavy makeup, revealing clothing, text, logo, watermark.
